campaignStatus: Vatandosh Terra Vita Support Fund is active

shelterSnapshot.primaryNeed: Food, medicine, veterinary care, sterilization support, shelter supplies, and adoption outreach

weeklyMessage: Terra Vita is a care center for homeless dogs and cats in Samarkand. The center depends on donations, volunteers, and community support to feed, treat, shelter, foster, repost, and place animals into homes. This week's public Telegram posts said shelter help remains needed, introduced Tuman after he came into shelter care, shared Marusya's adoption appeal, and urgently sought homes or temporary foster care for young puppies left in the heat.
urgentNeeds: Monthly food support for dogs and cats
Cleaning supplies, bedding, transport, and repair materials
Fresh water access during hot weather, including bowls for homeless animals
Temporary foster care for young animals awaiting homes
Adoption outreach, reposting, and responsible ownership education

featuredAnimals.name: Chelsea
featuredAnimals.story: Chelsea is listed on Terra Vita's dog adoption page. Visitors can follow the official shelter link for the latest adoption details.

featuredAnimals.name: Mika
featuredAnimals.story: Mika is listed on Terra Vita's cat adoption page. Visitors can follow the official shelter link for the latest adoption details.

featuredAnimals.name: Tuman
featuredAnimals.story: A July 18 public Telegram post says six-year-old Tuman came to Terra Vita after a veterinarian declined a former owner's request to euthanize him. The shelter reports that he is now free and happy in its care.

featuredAnimals.name: Marusya
featuredAnimals.story: A July 17 public Telegram appeal describes Marusya as a people-friendly, sterilized cat who has been treated for parasites and is living in temporary foster care in Samarkand while waiting for a permanent home.

featuredAnimals.name: Young puppies in Samarkand
featuredAnimals.status: Urgent home or foster appeal shared on Telegram
featuredAnimals.story: A July 18 public Telegram appeal says puppies approximately six weeks old had been left in the heat and urgently needed permanent homes or temporary foster care.

updates.title: Terra Vita shares a simple-help reminder
updates.text: A public Telegram post shared the message that helping can be simple, reinforcing the shelter's ongoing call for community involvement.

updates.title: Shelter says support remains needed
updates.text: A public Telegram post stated that help for the shelter remains needed and reshared Terra Vita's official help guide and payment details.

updates.title: Tuman is now in Terra Vita's care
updates.text: Terra Vita's public Telegram channel said six-year-old Tuman came to the shelter after a veterinarian declined a former owner's request to euthanize him. The shelter reports that he is now free and happy in its care.

updates.title: Young puppies urgently need homes or foster care
updates.text: A public Telegram appeal says puppies approximately six weeks old had been left in the heat in Samarkand and urgently needed permanent homes or temporary foster care.

updates.title: Marusya is seeking a permanent home
updates.text: A public Telegram appeal describes Marusya as a sterilized, people-friendly cat who has been treated for parasites and is staying in temporary foster care in Samarkand while waiting for a home.

updates.title: Hot-weather water appeal shared for homeless animals
updates.text: Terra Vita's public Telegram channel asked residents to leave bowls of water for homeless dogs, cats, and birds during the heat, when access to water is especially important.

updates.title: Busya is seeking a safe indoor home
updates.text: A public Telegram appeal describes Busya as a two-year-old sterilized cat who is litter-trained, vaccinated, and accustomed to indoor life. The appeal asks for a caring apartment home and adopters willing to stay in occasional contact.

updates.title: Terra Vita renews its shelter-support reminder
updates.text: A public Telegram post reminded followers about the shelter's animals and again shared Terra Vita's official help guide and payment details, supporting the continued need for food, medicine, care supplies, and financial help.

updates.title: Young female puppy needs responsible adopters
updates.text: A public Telegram appeal says a female puppy about six weeks old is looking for kind and responsible adopters in Samarkand.

updates.title: Telegram archive shows active adoption appeals
updates.text: The latest public Telegram archive view includes Samarkand adoption appeals for a kitten, a four-month-old female puppy, a five-month-old female adolescent dog, and other young animals. The appeals emphasize responsible homes and practical help with vaccination or sterilization where needed.

updates.title: Shelter repair and daily-care needs remain current
updates.text: A public Telegram archive post said water had returned to the shelter but noted that things keep breaking or wearing out. This supports keeping food, medicine, cleaning supplies, repair materials, and general shelter support as current needs.

updates.title: Recovering young animal remains part of current support message
updates.text: The Telegram archive includes a post saying a young animal is recovering, livelier, happy to see people, and enjoying walks. The same post points supporters to Terra Vita's help guide and payment details.

updates.title: Telegram post reports a successful rescue outcome
updates.text: Terra Vita's public Telegram channel said a small dog in Samarkand was taken home after community reposts and local help. The post frames reposting and local care as practical ways supporters can help animals reach safety.

updates.title: Treatment support continues for a small dog
updates.text: A public Telegram post thanked supporters who helped with treatment for a small dog and said the treatment had started. This supports keeping veterinary care and emergency treatment among current priority needs.

updates.title: Vatandosh launches Terra Vita support page
updates.text: This page is designed for U.S. neighborhood sharing. Donations are processed by Vatandosh Connect and designated for Terra Vita animal welfare support when donors write Terra Vita in the PayPal note.

updates.title: What we are tracking
updates.text: Weekly updates will focus on current shelter needs, featured animals, adoption stories, volunteer requests, and verified donation pathways.
